title: Trump vows to sink Iranian ships
snippet: Trump: 'If any of these ships come anywhere close to our BLOCKADE, they will be immediately ELIMINATED'. Trump said 'We can't let a country blackmail or extort the world'. Goal is to force Iran to reopen strait or negotiate, 'Both of those things, certainly, and more'.
tag_reason: New direct Trump threat to sink Iranian vessels. Escalatory rhetoric beyond previous blockade declaration.
